holdings.infoBox: TGRT is an equity ETF with a total of 90 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 13.96%, Apple at 10.07%, Alphabet at 8.36%, Microsoft at 7.72%, and Broadcom at 5.70%.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Growth ETF (TGRT) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 1234.29m in AUM and 94 holdings. TGRT is an actively managed fund that invests in US large-cap companies believed to have strong growth potential TGRT was launched on Jun 14, 2023 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.
